queries.question: What stops were visited during each field trip?
queries.sql: SELECT Stops.stopLocation  from Field_Trips_Stops join Stops on Field_Trips_Stops.stopID = Stops.stopID join Field_Trips on Field_Trips_Stops.tripID = Field_Trips.tripID   GROUP BY Field_Trips_Stops.stopID HAVING COUNT(DISTINCT Field_Trips_Stops.tripID) = (SELECT COUNT(*) FROM  Field_Trips)

queries.question: What stops were visited during each field trip?
queries.sql: select field_trips.fieldtripname , stops.stoplocation from Field_Trips_Stops join Stops on Field_Trips_Stops.stopID = Stops.stopID join Field_Trips on Field_Trips_Stops.tripID = Field_Trips.tripID
queries.sparql:
PREFIX : <http://ambrosia.example.org/education#>
PREFIX p: <http://ambrosia.example.org/education/prop#>
PREFIX xsd: <http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema#>
SELECT ?fieldtripname ?stoplocation WHERE {
  ?field_trips_stops a :Field_Trips_Stops .
  ?stops a :Stops .
  ?field_trips_stops p:hasStops ?stops .
  ?field_trips a :Field_Trips .
  ?field_trips_stops p:hasField_Trips ?field_trips .
  ?field_trips p:fieldTripName ?fieldtripname .
  ?stops p:stopLocation ?stoplocation .
}
